name: DeepRank-Ab
description: Rank antibody-antigen docking poses using a geometric deep-learning scoring model. Uses atom-level interface representation with antibody-specific features tailored for antibody-antigen interfaces. Outputs a predicted DockQ score to prioritize near-native models.
capabilities: Rank antibody-antigen docking poses using a geometric deep-learning scoring model
Uses atom-level interface representation with antibody-specific features tailored for antibody-antigen interfaces
Outputs a predicted DockQ score to prioritize near-native models

docking_poses.description: Antibody-antigen docking pose(s) in PDB format to rank

antibody_chain_ids.description: Chain IDs of the antibody chains (heavy and/or light)

antigen_chain_id.description: Chain ID of the antigen chain
